title: Small Field Knife Pocket Fishing Tackle Box Grooved Angle Sharpening Stone
description:
The pocket sharpening stone is a simple and economical tool for your tackle box, emergency kit, knife sheath and more. It is ideal for use in the field as it is not bulking and will not weigh you down. A sharp blade is imperative to any field operation and only allows for a better experience.

Small Field Knife Pocket Fishing Tackle Box Grooved Angle Sharpening Stone

The pocket sharpening stone is a simple and economical tool for your tackle box, emergency kit, knife sheath and more.

Key Features

  • Grit: 180
  • Material: Aluminum Oxide
  • Angled Groove in Center of Stone
  • Small Hole in Stone for String, Lanyard, Keychain,
  • Ideal for sharpening a variety of fish hooks, blades, and precesion work

Product Specifications

  • MPN: FH_SS-23
  • UPC: 100482771457
  • Color: Grey
  • Size: Pocket

It is ideal for use in the field as it is not bulking and will not weigh you down. A sharp blade is imperative to any field operation and only allows for a better experience.
